source_method: Exact-name Scryfall API lookups using /cards/named?exact=<card name> with JSON responses from api.scryfall.com.
candidate_intake_provenance: Stable intake manifest for candidate:scryfall references. Active candidate IDs remain in candidate_cards.json; promoted IDs remain in this manifest and resolve through canonical cards.json as historical candidate references.
boundary_statement: These records are Card Facts only. No recommendations are created, no deck changes are authorized, and future recommendation candidates may reference these facts only after validator support exists.
notes: This intake layer retains only active candidate facts; promoted records live in workshop/card-data/cards.json.
The candidate intake manifest preserves stable Scryfall identity and historical candidate provenance.
Active candidate facts are facts_only and are not deck recommendations.
